calcite.logical:
LogicalSystemLimit(fetch=[10000], type=[QUERY_SIZE_LIMIT])
  LogicalProject(age=[$8])
    LogicalFilter(condition=[OR(=($8, 0), AND(>=($8, 1), <=($8, 10)), AND(>($8, 20), <($8, 30)))])
      CalciteLogicalIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_account]])
calcite.physical:
EnumerableLimit(fetch=[10000])
  EnumerableCalc(expr#0..17=[{inputs}], expr#18=[Sarg[0L:BIGINT, [1L:BIGINT..10L:BIGINT], (20L:BIGINT..30L:BIGINT)]:BIGINT], expr#19=[SEARCH($t8, $t18)], age=[$t8], $condition=[$t19])
    CalciteEnumerableIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_account]])
